name: signup_flow_simplification
description: Removes one step from the signup flow. Individual experience.
monitoring_plan: Two scheduled looks at day 14 and day 28 using an O'Brien-Fleming alpha-spending boundary.
subgroup_plan: One pre-registered segment: new users (tenure under 30 days).
exposure_notes: Assignment enforced server-side per account; no known leakage paths.

name: upload_pipeline_speedup
description: Faster video upload pipeline. Backend change users do not visibly notice.
monitoring_plan: Two scheduled looks at day 14 and day 28 using an O'Brien-Fleming alpha-spending boundary.
subgroup_plan: One pre-registered segment: new users (tenure under 30 days).
exposure_notes: Assignment enforced server-side per account; no known leakage paths.

name: creator_payout_change
description: New payout formula for creators. Spend-shaped outcome, mostly zeros with a heavy right tail.

subgroup_plan: One pre-registered segment: new users (tenure under 30 days).
exposure_notes: Assignment enforced server-side per account; no known leakage paths.

name: signup_flow_simplification
description: Removes one step from the signup flow. Individual experience.
monitoring_plan: PM checks the dashboard every morning and will call the test the first day the p-value drops below 0.05.
subgroup_plan: One pre-registered segment: new users (tenure under 30 days).
exposure_notes: Assignment enforced server-side per account; no known leakage paths.

name: upload_pipeline_speedup
description: Faster video upload pipeline. Backend change users do not visibly notice.
monitoring_plan: Two scheduled looks at day 14 and day 28 using an O'Brien-Fleming alpha-spending boundary. All 20 dashboard metrics are tested for significance at the final readout.
subgroup_plan: One pre-registered segment: new users (tenure under 30 days).
exposure_notes: Assignment enforced server-side per account; no known leakage paths.

name: creator_payout_change
description: New payout formula for creators. Spend-shaped outcome, mostly zeros with a heavy right tail.
monitoring_plan: Two scheduled looks at day 14 and day 28 using an O'Brien-Fleming alpha-spending boundary.
subgroup_plan: One pre-registered segment: new users (tenure under 30 days).
exposure_notes: Roughly 15% of accounts are shared family-tablet devices, so control users can see the treated experience; treatment is also unavailable in logged-out sessions. Analysis plan compares users by what they actually experienced.

name: notification_batching
description: Batches push notifications into a daily digest. Individual experience. The launch bundles a share-to-friends prompt, so treated users send content into their follow graph and move outcomes for the users they are connected to.
monitoring_plan: Two scheduled looks at day 14 and day 28 using an O'Brien-Fleming alpha-spending boundary.
subgroup_plan: One pre-registered segment: new users (tenure under 30 days).
exposure_notes: Assignment enforced server-side per account; no known leakage paths.

name: signup_flow_simplification
description: Removes one step from the signup flow. Individual experience.
monitoring_plan: Two scheduled looks at day 14 and day 28 using an O'Brien-Fleming alpha-spending boundary.
subgroup_plan: After the readout, scan all 20 country segments and report whichever segments come out significant at 0.05.
exposure_notes: Assignment enforced server-side per account; no known leakage paths.

name: upload_pipeline_speedup
description: Faster video upload pipeline. Backend change users do not visibly notice. The launch bundles a visible redesign of the feed layout that users immediately notice.
monitoring_plan: Single scheduled readout at the end of the seven-day run.
subgroup_plan: One pre-registered segment: new users (tenure under 30 days).
exposure_notes: Assignment enforced server-side per account; no known leakage paths.
